title: Argentinian Cheese Casserole
description: A hearty, savory casserole from Argentina, rich in cheese and perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the cubed bread and cook until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
7. In a large bowl, combine the curd cheese, cooked bread mixture, and chopped parsley.
8. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Transfer the mixture to a 20x20cm baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
